title: NARS - Retail - New Delhi
short_writeup:
A premium beauty and cosmetics retail environment designed for NARS in Delhi, focused on delivering a luxurious and immersive customer experience aligned with the global brand identity.
The project emphasized high-end retail aesthetics, product highlighting, and experiential customer interaction.
challenge:
Creating a globally aligned luxury beauty retail experience while maintaining product visibility, customer engagement, and operational practicality.
The store also required precise detailing, premium finishes, and strong visual merchandising integration.
solution:
Developed a refined luxury retail environment with layered lighting, premium display systems, elegant material palettes, and hospitality-inspired customer interaction zones.
Integrated high-visibility product displays, sophisticated branding elements, and experiential retail planning to elevate the customer journey.

Scope of Work
Retail interior execution, display systems, lighting integration, product merchandising zones, customer experience planning, and luxury retail detailing.
Included premium product display counters, tester zones, branding integration, feature lighting, and customer circulation planning.
outcome:
Delivered a visually striking and immersive luxury retail environment that enhanced brand perception, customer engagement, and in-store experience.
The final store successfully reflected the premium identity and aspirational positioning

title: Bandra Cafe - Cafe & Lunge - Mumbai
short_writeup: A compact cafe reference showing how brand, counter design, lighting and circulation come together.
challenge: Small footprint with high operational load and a strong need for brand recall.
solution: Built the space around a visible counter, warm material contrast, quick service movement, and photogenic corners.
outcome: Useful proof for cafe, QSR and hospitality leads.

title: Pali Hill Penthouse — Warm Luxury
short_writeup: A layered warm-luxury penthouse reference with calm materials, strong detailing, and photo-ready family spaces.
challenge: Premium client wanted warmth without visual clutter, with strong storage and a hospitality-level living experience.
solution: Created a walnut, stone, brass and soft textile palette with concealed storage and layered lighting.
outcome: High-trust residential proof for premium apartment and penthouse prospects.

title: FableStreet - Turnkey Retail - Noida
short_writeup:
A contemporary fashion retail store designed for FableStreet in Noida, focused on creating a premium yet approachable customer shopping experience for modern women professionals.
The project combined elegant retail aesthetics with efficient product display planning and customer movement flow.
challenge:
Creating a visually premium retail environment while maintaining high product visibility, smooth customer circulation, and operational efficiency.
The store also needed to balance brand identity, merchandise flexibility, and Instagram-worthy visual appeal.
solution:
Designed a clean contemporary retail environment with layered display systems, soft lighting, elegant material palettes, and strategically planned customer movement.
Integrated feature displays, trial room comfort, visual merchandising zones, and modern retail detailing aligned with the FableStreet brand language.
outcome:
Delivered a refined and engaging retail experience that enhanced customer interaction, product presentation, and overall brand perception.
The final store environment created a more premium shopping journey while supporting better visual merchandising and customer flow.

title: Trillion Hotel - Hospitality & Leisure - Delhi
short_writeup:
A contemporary hospitality project designed for Trillion Hotel in New Delhi, focused on delivering a premium urban guest experience through refined planning and modern hospitality aesthetics.
The project emphasized operational efficiency, guest comfort, and a sophisticated architectural identity within a dense metropolitan setting.
challenge:
Balancing premium hospitality expectations with operational efficiency, guest movement, and modern urban hotel functionality.
The project also required creating a timeless luxury environment without excessive visual complexity.
solution:
Developed a contemporary hospitality design language with clean spatial planning, refined material palettes, layered lighting, and guest-centric circulation strategies.
Integrated elegant public spaces, comfortable guest environments, and modern hospitality detailing aligned with premium market expectations.

Scope
Hospitality planning, guest room interiors, lobby and public area design, circulation planning, lighting integration, and hospitality detailing.
Included reception areas, guest experience zones, lounge spaces, room planning, and premium hospitality ambience development.
outcome:
Delivered a sophisticated hospitality environment that enhanced guest experience, brand positioning, and operational usability.
The final hotel atmosphere created a calm, premium, and memorable urban hospitality experience suited for business and leisure travelers alike.

payload.title: Trillion Hotel - Hospitality & Leisure - Delhi
payload.outcome:

The final hotel atmosphere created a calm, premium, and memorable urban hospitality experience suited for business and leisure travelers alike.

title: Shibuya Bar - New Delhi
short_writeup:
A contemporary restaurant and lounge concept designed to create an immersive social dining experience with strong visual identity and hospitality ambience.
The project blended modern aesthetics with experiential nightlife and dining environments.
challenge: Creating a vibrant hospitality environment that balanced dining, social interaction, ambience, and operational flow efficiently.
solution: Designed layered hospitality spaces with mood lighting, dynamic seating zones, feature materials, and immersive customer experiences.
outcome: The final venue delivered a memorable dining and lounge atmosphere that enhanced customer engagement and hospitality appeal.
